title.en: It took a long time for the Purple Winged Realm...

content.en:
It took a long time for the Purple Winged Realm Lord to refine the second drop of multi-dimensional essence, and the extra-dimensional rules were improved again.

For countless years, he had struggled to make progress, and now that he was making progress so fast, he was extremely excited.

However, just when he thought that he could use the Multidimensional Treasure Bottle to impact the third realm, a figure crossed the many formations of the Six-Winged Family and silently descended in front of the Purple Winged Realm Lord.

"The third realm, no, is the fourth realm!!"

The Purple Winged Realm Lord was extremely terrified, he never thought that the existence of the Fourth Realm would actually come to him.

And this Fourth Realm was shrouded in wisps of gray mist, and he couldn't see through the other party's identity at all.

"Duowei Treasure Bottle, I didn't expect it to really exist!"

As soon as this Fourth Realm existence waved his hand, the Duowei Treasure Bottle in the Purple Winged Realm Master's hand fell into his hand.

"Spare ......"

Before the Purple Winged Realm Lord finished speaking, his body exploded and was absorbed by the Duo~ Wei Bao Bottle.

Immediately after, all the extra-dimensional realms of the entire Six-Winged Family turned into blood mist, which was absorbed by the multi-dimensional treasure bottle, and some multi-dimensional essences were bred inside.

Of course, the multidimensional essence was useless to him, and he was only doing this - to extinguish his mouth.

Immediately afterward, he erased all traces of the place, and no one knew that he had been here.

Wow!

This Fourth Realm being is gone.

Soon after, news spread that the Six-Winged Family had been destroyed.

After the Jialan Chamber of Commerce, Lianbaolou and other forces learned the news, they were panicked one by one.

They naturally knew why the Six-Winged Family was destroyed, it must be because of the Duowei Treasure Bottle.

If they were the first to use the Duowei Treasure Bottle, they would probably be the ones to be destroyed.

They also wondered why the news spread, they had made an extradimensional oath to each other, and it was impossible to pass on the news, so there was a high probability that the Nine-Star Pluto Snake Clan had spread the news.

Although the headquarters of the Nine-Star Dark Snake Clan has been destroyed, there may still be a small number of Nine-Star Snake Snakes alive in the outside world, and maybe there are Nine-Star Snakes who know about the Duowei Treasure, but it is not easy to transmit information to the territory of the Five Thousand Territory or even higher.

But they didn't dare to track down the information, and if they provoked that strong man, they would also be wiped out.

......

"The Six-Winged Family is gone?"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

This is a powerful family with several second realms and many first realm extradimensional realms, and they have been silently extinguished.

For the first time, he thought of the mysterious treasure that he snatched from the Nine Star Snake Clan, and it was most likely because of that mysterious treasure that the clan was wiped out.

"The Six-Winged Family has a super-dimensional realm at the peak of the second realm, and if it can destroy the Six-Winged Family, it must be the existence of the third realm or even the fourth realm!"

Ye Tian was a little frightened, if he faced such an existence, he would not even have the slightest power to resist, he was afraid that he would be wiped out in an instant.

It can be said that the Six-Winged Family was too unlucky, and thought that it had gained a great opportunity, but the entire family was wiped out.

"The treasures obtained by the Six-Winged Family are too amazing, and there are so many forces that know about it, as long as they leak a little news, they won't be able to keep it! In the future, if I obtain such an amazing treasure, I must not leak a trace, nor can I let the outside world know that it has something to do with the human race. "

He didn't go to find out why the Six-Winged Family was destroyed, and those treasures were not something he could snoop on now.

Moreover, there is a black statue on his body, which is estimated to be a treasure that is enough to attract the fourth realm, and he must keep it a secret, otherwise once it is revealed, he will also be killed, and maybe all the replica bodies will be found and all of them will be killed.

In the blink of an eye, several extradimensional epochs have passed.

His mysterious fragment had been exhausted, and he had comprehended the rules of the extradimensional to the realm of thirty-seven threads.

His current strength is much stronger than in the past, although he still can't beat the existence of the second realm, but at least the gap is constantly narrowing.

......

The influence of the destruction of the Six-Winged Family has gradually disappeared, and for endless years, I don't know how many extradimensional forces have been destroyed, and even more powerful forces than the Six-Winged Family have been destroyed.

Therefore, this matter can only be a sensation for a while, and it will not affect for too long.

With the destruction of the Six-Winged Family, the remnants of the Six-Winged Family have long been disbanded and hidden in the shadows, and the territory of the Six-Winged Family has been divided, which has made many forces grow a lot.

Ye Tian also took the opportunity to occupy the two extradimensional realms under the command of the Six-Winged Family, both of which were very close to the Seven Thousand Three Hundred and Sixty-two Territory, and the extradimensional realm of such a weak and small territory, other powerful extradimensional forces did not care too much.

With the current strength of the human race, it is nothing to occupy it.

Ye Tian directly asked several spirit puppets with the strength of the half-step transcendent realm to guard them, even if there were half-step superdimensional realms of other forces, they would not dare to provoke the human race.

Before you know it, an extradimensional era has passed. []

During this period of time, the territory of 6000 and some surrounding territories were very calm, and nothing major happened.

this day.

Ye Tian learned an important news through the Ice Ghost Organization.

The extradimensional storm has struck again, this time covering the territory of Seven Thousand and Nine and several nearby territories.

After learning this information, Ye Tian became interested.

"When the extra-dimensional storm comes, the super-dimensional elf will appear, and the super-dimensional elf is a very special extra-dimensional creature, and the super-dimensional patterns on its body will help the peak realm god to comprehend the super-dimensional power. Moreover, the superdimensional elves of the first realm at the peak of the superdimensional realm, the superdimensional patterns on their bodies are even more helpful to comprehend the superdimensional rules. "

"It is rumored that the extradimensional elves live in a special extradimensional void, if I can copy a superdimensional elf cultivated in the extradimensional realm, can I blend into the superdimensional elf clan? "

Ye Tian is planning this, but this is also very risky, in case the extradimensional elf clan has an incomparably terrifying existence, and can sense other bodies through his copy body, thus completely killing him.

But this possibility should not be great, the extradimensional elf should not be so terrifying, and it is separated by so many territories, so it will not kill him.

"You have to take risks, otherwise it is almost impossible to improve your strength quickly if you cultivate slowly like this. "

After Ye Tian secretly planned, he infiltrated the territory of Seven Thousand and Zero Nine, waiting for the arrival of the extradimensional storm.

Time passes slowly.

Soon after, an extradimensional storm finally descended on the mountain.
